description_long: This object consists of three wooden spoons, each with a distinct shape and handle design. The spoons are crafted from a medium-brown wood, with visible grain patterns and some carved decorative elements on the handles. One spoon features a straight handle with a rounded bowl, another has a slightly curved handle with a wide, flat bowl, and the third has an angular, bent handle with a small, deep bowl. The surfaces appear matte and slightly rough, suggesting hand-carved or minimally finished wood. The spoons show subtle variations in color and texture, indicating natural wood material. There are no visible metal or plastic components, and the overall appearance is rustic and utilitarian.
description: A set of three rustic wooden spoons with varied handle shapes and bowl sizes, featuring visible wood grain and carved details.
description_view_0: Three wooden spoons are shown side by side, highlighting their different handle shapes and bowl sizes from a slightly elevated angle.
description_view_1: The spoons are viewed from above, clearly displaying the distinct shapes of each bowl and the decorative carvings on the handles.
description_view_2: A side view emphasizes the thickness and curvature of the handles, as well as the depth of each spoon's bowl.
description_view_3: The spoons are seen from the opposite end, focusing on the ends of the handles and the backs of the bowls.
attribute_orientation: bowls facing upward, handles extending outward and to the sides
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a countertop or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar wooden utensils
